issues.message: Expected at least 3 code_input project exercise(s), but the draft has 0.
Exercise policy expects 3 "code_input" exercise(s), but the draft has 0.
Exercise policy expects "code_input" to be dominant, but the draft is dominated by "single_choice / multi_choice / drag_reorder / fill_blank_choice".
Exercise policy expects 11 total exercise(s), but the draft has 8.
